action.reasoning: Observation: the current best is 0.1952 from an equal 3-checkpoint ensemble (2e baseline, 3e, quickdraw-aug 2e) with two-view TTA. Analysis: inference-side ensembling is giving the strongest gains, and there is room to tune ensemble weights and add mild flip TTA without more training. Since the validated best remains preserved, a low-risk next experiment is to patch predict.py to support weighted manifests and selectable TTA views, then evaluate a weighted 3-model ensemble with center/full plus horizontal-flip views. Decision: update predict.py compatibly, create a weighted flip-TTA manifest, and submit it.
